title: DB2
text: DB2 The DB2 database connector enables you to integrate DB2 databases with Uniface. Connector Attribute/Feature Description Mnemonic: DB2 Supported Version: For the supported platforms and product versions, see the Platform Availability Matrix . Supported utilities Create Table and Load Definitions are supported. SQL support Yes Stored procedures support Yes Related Links DBMS Connector Overview This section provides an overview of supported functionality and limitations for all DBMS connectors.
